pom.xml.general_idea: Change the Maven compiler release property from Java 11 to Java 17 to target the new JDK version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Code using Java 17 features (e.g., sealed classes, pattern matching) will fail to compile if the compiler is still targeting Java 11.

pom.xml.general_idea: Explicitly set the release version in the maven-compiler-plugin configuration to ensure Java 17 targeting.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this, the plugin might not correctly apply the Java 17 release flag if the property is overridden or ignored in specific build contexts.
